_comment: Merge these entries into the project's settings.json hooks object. Adjust the grep pattern to match the project's protected directories.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/({{PROTECTED_DIRS_PATTERN}})/' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BRIGHT-LINE RULE: Before editing protected content, run the three checks: (1) Multi-paragraph scope? (2) Analytical claim alteration? (3) Sourced statement modification? If ANY is true, get operator approval first. Log to /logs/decisions.md."}' || exit 0; }
